description.en: Attacks an enemy and increases the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并使自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and increases all allies' <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy.\nIf this attack kills an enemy, increases the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> and increases the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\nこの攻撃で敵を倒した時、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>UPし、自分の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間UPする。
description.kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n이 공격으로 적을 처치하면 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 증가하고 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>이 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人。\n若该攻击致使敌人死亡,则使自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升\n<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>,并使自身<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nAfter the caster takes their turn, has a <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> chance to Counterattack, until the caster's next turn.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n自分がターンを獲得した後、次のターンの間<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>の確率で反撃する。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n자신이 턴을 획득한 이후, 다음 턴 동안 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>의 확률로 반격합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n自身获得回合后,下一回合有<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>的几率发动反击。

description.en:
(Passive Effect)
Increases <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>8%</color> each turn. (Max 5 stacks)

<color=#28d9ed>Immune to Weakness Gauge damage when an ally remains alive.</color>
description.jp:
(パッシブ効果)
毎ターン味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>と<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>8%</color>UPする。この効果は最大5回まで累積する。

<color=#28d9ed>戦場に味方がいる場合、WGダメージを受けない。</color>
description.kr:
(패시브 효과)
매 턴 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>과 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>이 <color=#28d9ed>8%</color> 증가합니다. (최대 5회 누적)

<color=#28d9ed>아군 생존 시 WG 피해를 받지 않습니다.</color>
description.zh:
(被动效果)
每回合使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>和<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>8%</color>。(最多可叠加5次)

<color=#28d9ed>友军存活时,不受到WG伤害。</color>
